description: Full Length Arch Support Insoles for Women and Men - Our ProTech orthotic inserts for men and women support pronation, arch pain, heel pain relief, plantar fasciitis, and heel spurs. Your Go To Orthotic Inserts for Women and Men - These plantar fasciitis relief orthotics provide full length, total contact support for a number of common foot issues. Easily Fix Your Arches - Standard, semi-rigid high arch insoles that fits most shoes including, work boot insoles, dress shoes and sneakers. Enhanced Comfort - Our ProTech memory foam shoe inserts have maximum cushioning featuring ShockAbsorb Premium Foam heel support cushion to increased protection. Support + Comfort - PowerStep ProTech orthotics pronation and overpronation are designed with built-in arch relief, heel cradle, and a perfect balance of support and comfort.

Legitimate PowerStep product packaging is marked with a unique US quality control code. If you are concerned that a PowerStep item is not legitimate, please contact PowerStep customer service.

safetyWarning: Consult a healthcare professional before use. Do not use if you have a foot injury or condition about which you are unaware. Follow proper sizing and usage guidelines to avoid discomfort or injury.
